title: Assertion Failure in INNER JOIN
description:
### What happens?

Dear DuckDB Developers,
I have encountered an internal error in joins and have prepared a reproducible case, which I’ve included below. I would greatly appreciate it if you could take a moment to review it.
```sql
CREATE TABLE t0(c0 INT);
CREATE TABLE t1(c0 BOOL);
PRAGMA old_implicit_casting='true';

SELECT * FROM t1 INNER JOIN t0 ON ((t1.c0)!~(CONCAT(NULL)) AND t0.c0);
```

### To Reproduce

```sql
CREATE TABLE t0(c0 INT);
CREATE TABLE t1(c0 BOOL);
PRAGMA old_implicit_casting='true';

SELECT * FROM t1 INNER JOIN t0 ON ((t1.c0)!~(CONCAT(NULL)) AND t0.c0);

Unimplemented type for value access
```

bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t2(c0 INT, c1 VARCHAR);
CREATE TABLE t3(c0 BOOL, c1 INT);
SELECT * FROM t2 INNER JOIN t3 ON (t2.c1 IS NOT NULL AND t3.c0 IS NOT NULL);
key_bug_features: INNER JOIN with NULL concatenation and boolean condition
